info.title: GLOW API
info.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI schema from FastAPI v3 API

post.description: Get profile/staff list with permissions and relationships.
Get detailed profile information (staff version with permissions).
Get all data needed for create staff UI (mappings, etc.).
Search staff with query and filters.
Process CSV file and map columns to target fields.
Create or update a staff member based on alias.
Bulk create or update staff members.
Get simple profile by ID (auth version without permissions).
Get consolidated profile context (profile, departments, cohorts, breadcrumbs).
Mark intro tour step as complete.
Mark chat tour step as complete.
Get profile by alias (for auth operations).
Get complete dashboard bundle with all metrics, history, insights, and mappings.

Get home overview with items, history, and mappings.

Home always shows general simulations only (no simulationFilters parameter).

Get practice overview with items, history, and all entity mappings.

Practice uses simplified filters: only profileId and departmentIds.
No cohort/role/date filtering for personal practice.
Get leaderboard bundle with all metrics and profile data.
Get reports bundle with aggregated metrics per profile and entity mappings.
Get pricing metrics with model usage and cost analysis.
Get personas list with permissions and scenario details.
Get default persona detail based on profile.
Get documents list with tags and scenarios.
Handle POST request for tus protocol - create upload.

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for tus protocol discovery.

head.description: Handle HEAD request for tus protocol - get upload info.

patch.description: Handle PATCH request for tus protocol - upload chunk.

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for specific upload.

post.description: Finalize an upload and process the file.
Generate a certificate PDF/text for a profile.
Get scenarios list with all relationships.
Get default scenario detail based on profile.
Generate AI scenario content (title, description, objectives).
Get simulations list with permissions and relationships.
Get default simulation details for a profile.
Get rubrics list with hierarchical structure and permissions.
Get default rubric details for a profile.
Create a new rubric with nested structure.
Update an existing rubric (replaces entire hierarchy).
Duplicate a rubric with entire hierarchy.
Get cohorts list with permissions and relationships.
Get default cohort details for a profile.
Get cohort detail with available profiles in one call.
Get providers list with nested models (hierarchical).
Duplicate a provider with all its models.
Decrypt provider API key for authorized users.
Get parameters list with item counts and permissions.
Get detailed parameter information with nested items.
Get default parameter details for a profile.
Create a new parameter with nested items.
Update an existing parameter (replaces all items).
Duplicate a parameter with all items.
Create a single parameter item (for inline creation from pickers).
Get list of departments with computed fields.
Get department detail with agent role assignments.
Get default department detail for a profile.
Create a new department with agent role assignments.
Update a department with agent role assignments.
Duplicate a department with all agent role assignments.

Remove profiles from department (set active = false in junction table).

NOTE: This does NOT delete profiles from the database, only removes the relationship.
Profiles remain in the system but are no longer associated with this department.
Get list of agents with permissions.
Get agent detail with debug info and metadata.
Get default agent detail metadata for creating new agents.
Get list of feedback with author information.
Bulk delete feedback. Only superadmin can delete feedback.
Get list of logs with actor information and all JSONB fields.
Bulk delete logs. Only superadmin can delete logs.

get.description:
Comprehensive system health check endpoint.
Tests all 9 system components with real functionality checks.
No authentication required (for monitoring tools).
Get complete attempt data with all related entities and computed values.

schema.title: Response Get Attempt Full Api V2 Attempts  Attempt Id  Full Get

post.description: Bulk archive or unarchive simulation attempts.

get.description: Get complete assistant chat data with all related entities.

schema.title: Response Get Assistant Chat Full Api V2 Assistant Chats  Chat Id  Full Get

get.description: Get all chats for a profile (for new chat state without chat_id).

schema.title: Response Get Assistant Chats List Api V2 Assistant Chats List  Profile Id  Get
